hints.text: Short plates that show a **blue tinge or a hint of green on the left** through the blur
**Grey car w/ a visible roof rack + side mirrors** on all car coverage (Laos similar; DR's car has black bar-stripes)
Tropical, mostly **rainforest**; pastel stone houses w/ **rusted sheet-metal roofs** + exposed white brick
Roads: solid white outer + single yellow middle, **thinner than Mexico's**; stop sign says **"ALTO"** (like MX/PA/CR)
Utility poles very commonly painted **pink, green, or both**
**Green utility poles** → SE + far NE; white **pole plates** (top two characters = which road you're on)
Middle of the country **mountainous**; south = flat & built-up; north = fairly flat / slightly rolling
Oil-palm plantations SW + just north of the central mountains; **Lago de Atitlán** = big lake ringed by mountains & volcanoes
Phone: **2 = Guatemala City, 6 = Guatemala Dept**; **Tikal** Mayan-temple trekker (far north); 'electricista' stickers = Guatemala City
